projects.title: Pivot：Enhancing Pathology Image-Text Alignment with a Pathology Knowledge Base
projects.intro: Pivot aligns pathological images, pathological ontologies, and text.
projects.description: Pivot aligns pathological images, pathological ontologies, and text. First, identify pathological terms within pathological images. Then, use their explanations as additional information for captions to enrich the text in image-text alignment. This enables more accurate semantic capture and helps pathological CLIP-like models achieve stronger zero-shot performance.

paper.paperTitle: Boosting Pathology Vision-Language Alignment with Ontologies

patent.name: 一种基于多模态本体一致性增强的图文对齐训练方法及系统
